zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
以太坊价格在1790上方窄幅震荡，日内微跌0.25%，整体维持高位整理，多空力量趋于均衡结构偏震荡偏强，短期方向未明等待突破确认

MACD维持5.68953正值动能，短线多头仍占优势，但RSI缺失导致超买判断不完整，趋势确认偏弱SMA20在1787提供支撑确认

上方阻力关注1800及1805区间，下方1787为SMA20支撑，若跌破或回测1775建议区间高抛低吸控制仓位避免追涨追高风险

整体处于高位盘整阶段，波动收敛，若放量突破1800上方或打开新一轮上行空间否则延续震荡关注量能变化谨慎追单等待确认信号为主

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase around 1,793, following a minor 24-hour decline of 0.25%. Price action remains compressed near the upper boundary of its recent micro-range, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the slight pullback, the structure remains mildly constructive as price holds above the 20-period simple moving average at 1,787. The broader short-term trend appears sideways with a subtle bullish bias developing.

Momentum indicators suggest a fragile but slightly positive structure. The MACD reading at 5.68953 indicates bullish momentum is present, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of crossover strength. Price holding above the SMA(20) reinforces near-term support, implying buyers are still defending dips. However, momentum is not strongly expanding, indicating consolidation rather than a decisive breakout phase. Volatility remains compressed across intraday candles.

Immediate resistance is clustered around 1,800.6, a level where price has repeatedly stalled during the latest 24-hour range. A sustained breakout above this zone would be required to confirm renewed bullish momentum and open the path toward higher intraday extensions. On the downside, initial support is located near the 20-period SMA at 1,787, which has recently acted as a dynamic floor for price stabilization.

From a trading perspective, the current environment favors range-based strategies over breakout positioning. Short-term traders may consider buying near support around 1,787 with tight risk controls below this level, targeting a retest of 1,800 resistance. Conversely, rejection near resistance could offer opportunities for short-term mean reversion trades. Position sizing should remain conservative due to low volatility and lack of strong directional confirmation.
